## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Use Case

What workflow or problem would this improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected behavior at a high level.

## Scope

Which component would this affect?

- ForceHub Chat Pro
- ForceHub Native Monitor V2
- Go ForceHub Agent
- C++ native tooling
- Rust security scanner
- Scripts
- Docs

## Public-Safety Check

Do not include secrets, tokens, passwords, private IP addresses, private paths, logs with sensitive data, screenshots with sensitive data, or real `.env` values.
